mapper.select:
SELECT POP_SEQ, TITLE, START_DT, END_DT, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM TB_POPUP WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY POP_SEQ DESC
SELECT * FROM TB_POPUP WHERE POP_SEQ = #{popSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POPUP (TITLE, START_DT, END_DT, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{title}, #{startDt}, #{endDt}, #{useYn}, #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_POPUP SET TITLE = #{title}, START_DT = #{startDt}, END_DT = #{endDt}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE POP_SEQ = #{popSeq}
UPDATE TB_POPUP SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE POP_SEQ = #{popSeq}
